_comment: File path → department owner map. Conflict Hawk hook reads this on every PreToolUse(Edit|Write) call. Only the owning department's workers may modify a path.

backend-api.description: API routes, server actions, server-side libs, middleware, LLM callers

database-auth.description: Migrations, RLS policies, Supabase clients, auth flows

frontend-ui.description: Pages, layouts, design system, dashboard shell

productivity-tools.description: Tool definitions, widgets, catalog, blueprint page, full-page tool routes

data-reports.description: Reports, KPI cards, cross-tool aggregation, relation graph

excel-export.description: ExcelJS rewrite, dashboard sheets, per-tool sheet builders, styling

i18n-content.description: All locale files, i18n routing, copy quality, trilingual parity

infrastructure.description: Build config, deps, Vercel config, PWA, env templates

shared_readonly._comment: Files any worker may READ but none may modify except via CO.

co_only._comment: Files only the Chief Orchestrator may modify.

tests_shared._comment: Any dept may add tests for their own code under tests/<dept>/. Cross-dept tests go to tests/integration/ which only QA cell may modify.
